details.reasoning: The implementation fully satisfies all rubric requirements. The PixelArt provider package is properly structured under packages/pixelart/ with a complete package.json following SDK conventions. The createPixelArt factory function is exported and returns a PixelArtProvider object that creates PixelArtImageModel instances. The image model correctly implements ImageModelV3 with a doGenerate method (correct v3 pattern, not generateImage). Image settings schema properly supports all required options: size (256x256/512x512/1024x1024), style (pixel/retro/8bit), and pixelDensity (1-4). The base URL is correctly set to 'https://api.pixelart.ai/v1'. The package structure mirrors existing AI SDK providers with proper tsconfig, vitest configs, build setup, and type exports. The provider appropriately throws NoSuchModelError for unsupported model types (languageModel, embeddingModel). No existing packages were modified—only necessary tsconfig.json was updated to include the new package reference. Comprehensive tests are included. The implementation is production-ready and follows all AI SDK v3 patterns.
